message:
test(procinfo): expand from 81 to 101 tests for process info (wa-3dug2)

Add 20 new tests covering flatten branching subtrees, deep nested clone,
large pid values, bare filename executables, parent process lookup,
executable path canonicalization, sysctl buffer edge cases, and status
conversion boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
